title: rosa gallica var. oligacantha
intro: Rosa gallica var. oligacantha, also known as the French rose or Old Rose, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the family Rosaceae and is native to southern Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa gallica var. oligacantha include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies.
